languages.text: "Признаю, некоторые успехи я все же наблюдаю, но этого мало". {n}Себериан с хрустом сжимает аугментированный кулак.{/n} "Первый же враг, подобный Диодасу аф Иррамону, одним мановением руки сотрет в пыль все ваши достижения"
languages.translation_comment: [blueprint] Если есть хотя бы один законченный проект 5 лвл

traits.locale_text: "Признаю, некоторые успехи я все же наблюдаю, но этого мало". {n}Себериан с хрустом сжимает аугментированный кулак.{/n} "Первый же враг, подобный Диодасу аф Иррамону, одним мановением руки сотрет в пыль все ваши достижения"
traits.speaker: DLC3_DL_SeberianVonValancius

languages.translation_comment: [blueprint] Если есть хотя бы один законченный проект 5 лвл

languages.text: "I admit, I do observe some successes, yet they are insufficient." {n}Seberian clenches his augmetic fist with a grating crunch.{/n} "The very first enemy to arise, one such as Diodas af Irramon, shall grind all your achievements to dust with a mere wave of their hand."
languages.original_text: "Признаю, некоторые успехи я все же наблюдаю, но этого мало". {n}Себериан с хрустом сжимает аугментированный кулак.{/n} "Первый же враг, подобный Диодасу аф Иррамону, одним мановением руки сотрет в пыль все ваши достижения"

traits.locale_text: "I admit, I do observe some successes, yet they are insufficient." {n}Seberian clenches his augmetic fist with a grinding crunch.{/n} "The first enemy to arise, one such as Diodas af Irramon, shall grind all your achievements to dust with a mere wave of their hand."

"I admit, I do observe some successes, yet they are insufficient." {n}Seberian clenches his augmetic fist with a grating crunch.{/n} "The very first enemy to arise, one such as Diodas af Irramon, shall grind all your achievements to dust with a mere wave of their hand."

"I admit, I do observe some successes, yet they are insufficient." {n}Seberian clenches his augmetic fist with a grating crunch.{/n} "The very first enemy to arise, one such as Diodas af Irramon, shall grind all your achievements to dust with a mere wave of their hand."

"I admit, I do observe some successes, yet they are insufficient." {n}Seberian clenches his augmetic fist with a grating crunch.{/n} "The very first enemy to arise, one such as Diodas af Irramon, shall grind all your achievements to dust with a mere wave of their hand."

languages.text: «Admito que he presenciado algún que otro triunfo, pero no son bastantes». {n}Seberian cierra el puño aumético con un fuerte crujido.{/n} «El primero enemigo que aparezca, como en mi caso Diodas af Irramon, reducirá a polvo todos sus logros con un simple ademán».
languages.original_text: "I admit, I do observe some successes, yet they are insufficient." {n}Seberian clenches his augmetic fist with a grating crunch.{/n} "The very first enemy to arise, one such as Diodas af Irramon, shall grind all your achievements to dust with a mere wave of their hand."

traits.locale_text: «Admito que he presenciado algún que otro triunfo, pero no son bastantes». {n}Seberian cierra el puño aumético con un fuerte crujido.{/n} «El primero enemigo que aparezca, como en mi caso Diodas af Irramon, reducirá a polvo todos sus logros con un simple ademán».

languages.text: “我承认，我确实看到了一些成就，但还远远不够。”{n}塞贝里安攥紧他的植入物铁拳，发出刺耳的金属摩擦声。{/n}“只要冒出一个像是狄奥达斯·阿夫·伊拉蒙那样的敌人，你所有的功绩就会被他轻而易举地化作齑粉。”
languages.original_text: "I admit, I do observe some successes, yet they are insufficient." {n}Seberian clenches his augmetic fist with a grating crunch.{/n} "The very first enemy to arise, one such as Diodas af Irramon, shall grind all your achievements to dust with a mere wave of their hand."

traits.locale_text: “我承认，我确实看到了一些成就，但还远远不够。”{n}塞贝里安攥紧他的植入物铁拳，发出刺耳的金属摩擦声。{/n}“只要冒出一个像是狄奥达斯·阿夫·伊拉蒙那样的敌人，你所有的功绩就会被他轻而易举地化作齑粉。”

languages.text: « Je reconnais avoir constaté un certain nombre de succès, mais ils sont par trop insuffisants, {n}rétorque Seberian en serrant son poing bionique avec un grincement métallique.{/n} Le tout premier ennemi à se manifester, comme Diodas af Irramon, réduira vos accomplissements à néant d'un simple revers de main. »
languages.original_text: "I admit, I do observe some successes, yet they are insufficient." {n}Seberian clenches his augmetic fist with a grating crunch.{/n} "The very first enemy to arise, one such as Diodas af Irramon, shall grind all your achievements to dust with a mere wave of their hand."

traits.locale_text: « Je reconnais avoir constaté un certain nombre de succès, mais ils sont par trop insuffisants, {n}rétorque Seberian en serrant son poing bionique avec un grincement métallique.{/n} Le tout premier ennemi à se manifester, comme Diodas af Irramon, réduira vos accomplissements à néant d'un simple revers de main. »

languages.text: "İtiraf etmeliyim ki bazı başarılar gözlemliyorum ancak bunlar yetersiz." {n}Seberian, gıcırdayan bir çatırtıyla ogmetik yumruğunu sıkıyor.{/n} "Diodas af İrramon gibi karşına çıkacak ilk düşman, elinin tek bir hareketiyle tüm başarılarını toza çevirecektir."
languages.original_text: "I admit, I do observe some successes, yet they are insufficient." {n}Seberian clenches his augmetic fist with a grating crunch.{/n} "The very first enemy to arise, one such as Diodas af Irramon, shall grind all your achievements to dust with a mere wave of their hand."

traits.locale_text: "İtiraf etmeliyim ki bazı başarılar gözlemliyorum ancak bunlar yetersiz." {n}Seberian, gıcırdayan bir çatırtıyla ogmetik yumruğunu sıkıyor.{/n} "Diodas af İrramon gibi karşına çıkacak ilk düşman, elinin tek bir hareketiyle tüm başarılarını toza çevirecektir."

languages.text: 「確かに、私は成功をいくつか観察していますが、それは十分ではありません。」{n}シベリアは歯ぎしりしながら強化された拳を握る。{/n}「最初の敵、ディオダス・ア・イルラモンのような者であれば、彼らの手を振るだけで、あなたのすべての成果を塵に帰します。」
languages.original_text: "I admit, I do observe some successes, yet they are insufficient." {n}Seberian clenches his augmetic fist with a grating crunch.{/n} "The very first enemy to arise, one such as Diodas af Irramon, shall grind all your achievements to dust with a mere wave of their hand."

traits.locale_text: 「確かに、私は成功をいくつか観察していますが、それは十分ではありません。」{n}シベリアは歯ぎしりしながら強化された拳を握る。{/n}「最初の敵、ディオダス・ア・イルラモンのような者であれば、彼らの手を振るだけで、あなたのすべての成果を塵に帰します。」

languages.text: "Ich gebe zu, ich erkenne einige Erfolge, wenngleich sie nicht ausreichen." {n}Seberian ballt knirschend seine augmentierte Faust.{/n} "Der erste Gegner der sich regt, jemand wie Diodas af Irramon, lässt alle unsere Erfolge mit einer einzigen Handbewegung zu Staub zerfallen."
languages.original_text: "I admit, I do observe some successes, yet they are insufficient." {n}Seberian clenches his augmetic fist with a grating crunch.{/n} "The very first enemy to arise, one such as Diodas af Irramon, shall grind all your achievements to dust with a mere wave of their hand."

traits.locale_text: "Ich gebe zu, ich erkenne einige Erfolge, wenngleich sie nicht ausreichen." {n}Seberian ballt knirschend seine augmentierte Faust.{/n} "Der erste Gegner der sich regt, jemand wie Diodas af Irramon, lässt alle unsere Erfolge mit einer einzigen Handbewegung zu Staub zerfallen."
